text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: mat
Date: Mon Jun 11 12:01:00 UTC 2018
New revision: 472187
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/472187

Log:
  Remove inconditionnal WITH_DEBUG.

  mongodb works just fine without it, and it leads to packages that are 10
  times bigger than needed.

  PR:		228494
  Submitted by:	mat
  Sponsored by:	Absolight
